mapper.select: SELECT user_id, name, email, nickname, password, birth_date, is_foreigner, tel, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, name, email, tel FROM users WHERE name = #{name} AND REPLACE(tel, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{tel}, '-', '') LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, name, email, nickname, password, birth_date, is_foreigner, tel FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND password = #{password} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, name, email, nickname, tel, birth_date, is_foreigner, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, name, email, nickname, password, birth_date, is_foreigner, tel FROM users WHERE REPLACE(tel, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{tel}, '-', '') LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( NAME, EMAIL, NICKNAME, PASSWORD, BIRTH_DATE, TEL, IS_FOREIGNER ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{password}, #{birthDate}, #{tel}, #{isForeigner} )
